name: RecoveryBoot
description: FreeInk boot-time recovery hatch. Held at reset, a button combo (Back + Up) repoints otadata at OTA slot 0 and reboots into the recovery / 'escape hatch' firmware. Call recovery::checkBootCombo() as the first line of setup() in every firmware you want escapable. Self-contained otadata switch (no esp_image_verify, so it accepts patched Xteink images) plus combo detection via InputManager. No-op unless the combo is held, slot 0 holds a valid app image, and you're not already running from slot 0.
keywords: recovery, ota, bootloader, otadata, escape-hatch, xteink
